author: Augustine of Hippo
book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.

classification.cautionReason: No major mainstream heresy warning is attached by the preview classifier.

lineage: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
On the same words of John i., ‘In the beginning was the word,’ etc.

source.title: NPNF1-06. St. Augustine: Sermon on the Mount; Harmony of the Gospels; Homilies on the Gospels

title: On the same words of John i., ‘In the beginning was the word,’ etc.

source.title: NPNF1-06. St. Augustine: Sermon on the Mount; Harmony of the Gospels; Homilies on the Gospels

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: The beginning of John’s Gospel, “In the beginning was the Word.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Thus he begins, this he saw, and transcending the whole creation, mountains, air, the heavens, the stars, Thrones, Dominions, Principalities, Powers, all Angels, and Archangels, transcending all; he saw the Word in the beginning, and drank It in.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: He saw above every creature, he drank in from the Lord’s breast.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: For this same St. John the Evangelist is he whom Jesus specially loved; insomuch that he lay on His Breast at supper.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: There was this secret, that therefrom might be drunk in, what in the Gospel was to be poured forth.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Happy they who hear and understand.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Of the next degree of blessedness are they who though they understand not, believe.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: For how great a thing it is to see This Word of God, who can explain in human words?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Lift up your hearts, my Brethren, lift them up as best ye can; whatsoever occurs to you from the idea of any body whatsoever, reject.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: If the Word of God occurs to you under the idea of the light of this sun, expand, extend how you will, set no bounds in your thought to that light; it is nothing to the Word of God.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Whatsoever of this sort the mind conceives, is less in one part than in the whole.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Of theWord conceive as Whole everywhere.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Understand ye what I say; because of my stress of time I am limiting myself as much as I can for your sakes.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Understand ye what I say.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Lo, this light from heaven, which is called by the name of the sun, when it comes forth, it enlightens the earth, unfolds the day, develops forms, distinguishes colours.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Great blessing it is, great gift of God to all mortal men; let His works magnify Him.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: If the sun is so beauteous, what more beauteous than the sun’s Maker?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: And yet look, Brethren; lo, he pours his rays through the whole earth; penetrates open places, the closed resist him; he sends his light through windows; can he also through a wall?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: To the Word of God all is open, from the Word of God nothing is hid.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Observe another difference, how far from the Creator is the creature, especially the bodily creature.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: When the sun is in the East, it is not in the West.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Its light indeed shed from that vast body reaches even to the West; but itself is not there.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: When it begins to set, then it will be there.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: When it rises, it is in the East; when it sets it is in the West.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: By these operations of his, it has given name to those quarters.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Because it is in the East when it rises at the East, it has made it be called the Rising Sun; because it is at the West when it sets at the West, it has made it be called the Setting Sun.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: At night it is nowhere seen.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Is the Word of God so?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: When It is in the East, is It not in the West; or when It is in the West, is It not in the East? or does It ever leave the earth, and go under or behind the earth?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: It is Whole everywhere.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Who can in words explain this?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: By what means of proof shall I establish to you what I say?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: I am speaking as a man, it is to men I speak; I am speaking as one weak, to men weaker am I speaking.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: And yet, my brethren, I am bold to say that I do in some sort see what I am saying to you, though “through a glass,” or “darkly,” I do in some sort understand even within my heart a word touching this thing.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: But it seeks to go forth to you, and finds no meet vehicle.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: The vehicle of the word is the sound of the voice.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: What I am saying within mine own self I seek to say to you, and words fail.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: For I wish to speak of the Word of God.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: How great a Word, what kind of Word?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: “All things were made by Him.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: See the works, and stand in awe of the Worker.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: “All things were made by Him.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Return with me, O human infirmity, return, I say.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Let us comprehend these human things if we can.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: We are men, I who speak, I am a man, and to men I speak, and utter the sound of my voice.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: I convey the sound of my voice to men’s ears, and by the sound of my voice I somehow through the ear lay up understanding also in the heart.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Let us then speak on this point what and how we can, let us comprehend it.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: But if we have not ability to comprehend even this, in respect of the Other what are we?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Lo, ye are listening to me; I am speaking a word.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: If any one goes out from us, and is asked outside what is being done here, he answers, “The Bishop is speaking a word.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: I am speaking a word of the Word.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: But what a word, of what a Word?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: A mortal word, of the Word Immortal; a changeable word, of the Word Unchangeable; a passing word of the Word Eternal.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Nevertheless, consider my word.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: For I have told you already, the Word of God is Whole everywhere.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: See, I am speaking a word to you; what I say reaches to all.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Now that what I am saying might come to you all, did ye divide what I say?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: If I , were to feed you, to wish to fill not your minds, but your bodies, and to set loaves before you to be satisfied therewith; would ye not divide my loaves among you?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Could my loaves come to every one of you?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: If they came to one only, the rest would have none.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: But now see, I am speaking, and ye all receive.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Nay, not only all receive, but all receive it whole.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: It comes whole to all, to each whole.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: O the marvels of my word!

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: What then is the Word of God?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: I have spoken; what I have spoken, has gone forth to you, and has not gone away from me.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: It has reached to you, and has not been separated from me.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Before I spake, I had it, and ye had not; I spake, and ye began to have, and I lost nothing.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: O the marvel of my word!

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: What then is the Word of God?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: From little things form conjectures of things great.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Consider earthly things, laud the heavenly.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: I am a creature, ye are creatures; and such great miracles are done with my word in my heart, in my mouth, in my voice, in your ears, in your hearts.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: What then is the Creator?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: O Lord, hear us.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Make us, for that Thou hast made us.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Make us good, for that Thou hast made us enlightened men.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: These white-robed, enlightened ones hear Thy word by me.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: For enlightened by Thy grace they stand before Thee.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: “This is the day which the Lord hath made.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Only let them labour, let them pray for this, that when these days shall have gone by, they may not become darkness, who have been made the light of the wonders and the blessings of God.
